sourcesContent:
# Await, async auto-marking, and generators. All awaits sit
# inside functions (module-level top-level await would fail the
# Function-validation tier); dammit rows live in test/async.test.js
# are non-comparable by design).
double = (x) -> x * 2

fetchOne = ->
  await Promise.resolve(41)

addFetched = (a) ->
  base = await fetchOne()
  base + a

fatFetch = (k) => await Promise.resolve(k)

compute = ->
  v = if await fetchOne() then "yes" else "no"
  w = await Promise.resolve(2) + 3
  [v, w]

grabStatus = ->
  r = (await fetchOne()).toString()
  r

collect = ->
  vals = (await Promise.resolve(i) for i in [1, 2, 3])
  vals

tryValue = ->
  v = try
    await fetchOne()
  catch e
    0
  v

class Fetcher
  pull: ->
    await fetchOne()
  sync: -> 7

api = {run: -> await fetchOne(), plain: -> 5}

counter = ->
  yield 1
  yield 2

delegate = -> yield from counter()

echoBack = ->
  got = yield 1
  got
